hero.title: Professional cleaning with
hero.subtitle: Providers execute in the app with geofence, photos and check-out. Clients track properties, history and contracts on the web portal — all in real time.

features.label: Features
features.title: Built for
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed for field execution and client trust.

geofence.title: GPS geofence
geofence.description: Check-in and check-out validated within 200 m — contract rigor with visual alerts.

photos.title: Visual proof
photos.description: Before and after photos in the flow. Clients see results in history.

realtime.title: Real time
realtime.description: New orders, critical stock and updates synced instantly.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Providers check stock in the field; clients get critical alerts.

billing.title: Earnings & billing
billing.description: Providers track earnings; clients view contracts and charges.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Clients rate each completed cleaning — direct feedback after service.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From check-in to check-out,
howItWorks.step1Desc: Provider receives the cleaning in real time on their phone — it appears on today's schedule.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Proximity validation (200 m), before photos and guided step-by-step execution.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Additional services marked in the field. Client and provider track critical stock.
howItWorks.step4Desc: After photos, GPS again and service completed. Client reviews via the portal.

languages.label: Global
languages.title: Your operation speaks
languages.subtitle: Mobile app and web portals in Portuguese, English, Spanish, French and German. Switch anytime — your choice is saved.
languages.hint: PT · EN · ES · FR · DE — the same EB Services experience in any language.

experiences.label: Experiences
experiences.title: Provider and client,
experiences.subtitle: Two interfaces for those who execute the cleaning and those who trust the service — full features in each profile.
experiences.providerDesc: Daily schedule, cinematic execution flow, GPS, photos and offline sync.
experiences.clientDesc: Complete view of properties, cleanings, inventory and digital contracts.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your cleaning operation?
cta.subtitle: Mobile app for providers and web portal for clients — geofence, photos, inventory and real-time notifications in 5 languages.

footer.tagline: Professional cleaning with technology — provider in the field, client connected.
